# seerr_jobs (Data Source)

Get information about all background jobs in Seerr.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Placeholder ID for the data source.
- `jobs` (Attributes List) List of jobs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--jobs))

<a id="nestedatt--jobs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `jobs`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the job is enabled.
- `id` (String) The ID of the job.
- `interval` (String) Job interval.
- `last_run` (String) Last run time.
- `name` (String) The name of the job.
- `next_run` (String) Next run time.
- `schedule` (String) Cron schedule.
- `type` (String) The type of job.
